source_pr.title: plan: fix bug when access cond is not scalar function
source_pr.body:
Access condition may not be scalar function, so previous check will cause panic.
PTAL @zz-jason @shenli

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where 1 order by b").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where 1 order by b").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2")) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from t where 1 order by b").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2")) (executor/executor_test.go)
